title: Moonlit Garden
caption:
Some dogs chase tennis balls. This one chases fireflies through enchanted gardens.

A golden retriever in full Ghibli glory — wisteria overhead, moonlight on the pond, and that classic 'I know something you don't' smile. If Miyazaki made a film about the goodest boy, this would be the poster.

Which Ghibli film would your pet star in?

title: Chef's Kiss
caption:
He didn't ask to be the head chef. He was born for it. He's also furious about it.

Meet our latest Grumpy Cutie — a red panda with a chef's hat, crossed arms, and a face that says 'my soufflé is NONE of your business.' Chunky, fluffy, and absolutely done with your substitutions.

Rate his kitchen attitude 1-10 below.

title: Woolly Wanderer
caption:
Someone knitted this corgi a scarf and honestly? He's never taking it off.

Our Felt Friends series brings animals to life as needle-felted wool puppets — woolly texture, glossy eyes, and all the cozy vibes of a Wes Anderson film. This little guy looks ready for his close-up.

Would you watch a stop-motion film starring this corgi? (The answer is yes.)
